meaning: n.强盗,无赖,阿飞,恶棍,流氓
examples: My not hoodlum, but ill health.
The hoodlum menaced the local merchants.
A violent or rowdy person; a hoodlum or thug.
The word tsotsi means hoodlum or gangster in the slang spoken in South Africa's Soweto township.
Automakers don't want a roadside hoodlum to be able to bring traffic to a halt with the push of a button.
